'''Gorr Desilijic Ebelt''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] of the [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]].

==Biography==
Gorr maintained the largest criminal network on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], during the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. He was an embarrassment to his clan, with a reputation as a coward, and controlled Naboo's underground only because [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] felt that he could not cause any real trouble there.
